string 2: Aaah, glurp!

Where'd you go?! You disappeared all of a sudden, so
I was worried, glurp!
Whew... Okay, we have to hurry up to see Lord Plutomon, glurp.
Now then... Get it over with! Give it your best shot, glurp!

Go ahead, glurp. I'm ready for it! Gimme a real, sweet groaner!
One that will make me cringe my face off, glurp!

Come on, glurp it out! Are you self-conscious all of a sudden?
Don't tell me you've forgotten!

I mean, you kept on saying a bunch of them before, even
when I kept glurping telling you to stop!

Argh, glurp! I'm talking about some empty, meaningless
sweet-talk, glurp!

The fakest, phoniest, full-of-Sukamon compliment
you can think of, glurp!

C'mon, glurp. You must have somethin' for me!
Just say whatever comes to mind, glurp!
{next}I want to save every living being in this world.
{next}I want everyone to live in peace and harmony!
...Have we met before?
Whaaaaa, glurp!
Gaaagh, glurp... *gag* *retch*
*panting* Do you get it now, glurp?

Whenever I hear an empty platitude, I cringe so hard
I end up leaping somewhere, glurp.

I can sometimes choose where I land, but depending on the
cliche, I might end up somewhere kinda strange, glurp.

I start feeling nauseous and it puts me in a really
glurping bad mood, so I don't like doing it, glurp...

...But still, it's for Lord Plutomon, after all. So I've got
no choice but to glurp it up.
Okay, time to go see Lord Plutomon, glurp! *retch*

Ugh! *retch* Stop! Ugh! Enough!
I don't need any glurpin' more!

Oh man, it's not gonna be easy leaping such a huge
distance, glurp...
No, this is for Lord Plutomon, glurp! C'mon, glurp!
I never want to see anyone cry.
I want everyone to be happy.
{end}[Hold off.]
Whaaaaa, glurp!
I want everyone to join hands in happiness!
I need your help to create a better future!
Whaaaaa, glurp!
*gag* *retch* You dare summon me, glurp?!
Who do you glurpin' think you are?! I won't glurpin' forgive this!
I-I'm sorry, glurp... I suppose I got a little carried away, glurp...
Wh-What are you doing here, anyway, glurp?
I wanna see Plutomon.
I need your help.
Lord Plutomon, glurp?! Actually, perhaps this is fate, glurp.

Something's off with Lord Plutomon lately, glurp. I know
I'm just an underling, but I'm starting to worry, glurp...

I don't have the courage to go and see what's wrong
by myself, glurp.

Although if you were with me, I think I could do it, glurp!
Okay, just leave getting to him to me then!
You can count on me! Let's go see Lord Plutomon, glurp!
Eh, glurp?
{next}I'm here to negotiate with Plutomon.
Aww, glurp...
{next}...Wanna go together?
Great, glurp!

Are you the flunky of that envoy from before? If so, I'll
gladly welcome you as a guest...

...but if not, get lost. We're in the middle of some important
talks here.

Oh, it's you... There's nothing here of interest. Although,
it's not like I'm going to stop you from looking around.

Damn! How did that happen?! I don't think I've ever
suffered such an embarrassing defeat before.

Huh?! Who the heck are you?! I don't have time to deal with
you right now!
Tch! That golden dragon is quite the formidable force.
Who are you?! And where did you come from?!
Hmph. Worry not, for I have no interest in that town.

However, in regard to that particular individual... We will
have our fated showdown one day...

That one just now... I let them through because they said they
were Lord Plutomon's guest... They had quite the aura.
That Digimon who set out for the castle... Who were they?

Let's hear a real groaner, glurp! A platitude that'll send me
flying! Just say whatever comes to mind, glurp!
I wish for the world to be showered with love.
True evil does not exist in this world.
{end}[Hold off.]
{next}I wish for the world to be showered with love.
True evil does not exist in this world.
{end}[Hold off.]

Urp...
Darn! This isn't where I parked my Digi Beetle!
*retch*

All friendships serve as an eternal bond.

*panting* *gag* *retch*
You again, glurp?! Aw, gimme a break, already, glurp!
You should hurry to Plutomon.

Boo! You looking for a card battle? I should warn you. I'm
pretty good.
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Kehehe... That's too bad.
Kehehe... You're not bad! That was fun!
Kehehe... I win! Come back after you've practiced some more.
Something's wrong, glurp! What happened to the gatekeeper?!
Let's go to Lord Plutomon, glurp!

There's the gatekeeper... I guess it's time for me to
do my thing, glurp!
Okay, let's go, glurp!
Nothing good ever comes of conflict!
Don't let your dreams be dreams! Just do it!
Whaaaaa, glurp!
*panting* That packed quite the punch, glurp.
*retch* Okay, we're all set... Let's go see Lord Plutomon, glurp!
We need to go see Lord Plutomon, glurp!

...You. I will never forget what you did for me. I swear I shall pay 
you back one day... on my pride as a Titan.

The Dark Field is a dead land where the Current cannot
reach, but it is sacred to the Titans. Leave at once.

Just who was that envoy, anyway?
I only hope that Lord Plutomon is okay...
He's not breathing. He must've been attacked by someone.
...No response. He's already dead.

I'm glad Lord Plutomon is alive... I better brace myself,
too.
What is it? Do you wish to return to the floating island?
Yes.
No.
Hang on tight. You don't want to fall.
I can tell that you are not from around here. What is your purpose?

This is our place of tranquility. There is no reason for
outsiders to come here.

Although, it appears you have been tasked with a mission. I
suppose we can allow you to see it to fruition.

Oh! Myotismon, my master! The time for glorious revenge is
here, boss!

So this moment has come at last... Perhaps I was being too
hard on myself.
Go forth, Infermon! Bury your opponent beneath you!

I ain't never seen you before... Ya new around here, partner?
At any rate, I'm glad you're here!

You're welcome to get a drink, but it'll taste even better
if you enjoy it while watchin' those guys do battle.

It sure was fun fighting outside for a change. Perhaps I should
start preparing for the next one...

I always thought Wisemon's stories were kinda long, but the
tellin' is so good, I find myself hangin' on every word.
Ah, you must be... that outsider that I have heard so much about.
At present, I am teaching our new residents about our kind.

Actually, this might be a good opportunity to tell you as
well. Would you like to hear my tale?

Let me see here... Ah, yes. I think I shall tell you about
my kinfolk that you have come into contact with.
Tell me about the Titans.
Tell me about Plutomon.
Tell me about Titamon.
Tell me about Ogremon and Goblimon.
No, thank you. I'm good.

Those you refer to as "Titans" were originally known as "the
warriors of Iliad."

They were Digimon who gathered together to free the hero
from the fundamental principles of the world that bound it.

However, the hero was defeated, and the warriors were found
guilty of rebellion.

They were branded as treasonous conspirators, and were exiled
to the lowest level of Iliad.

In response, the warriors attempted to harness the power of
the Current in order to strike back...

Indeed, this is currently a period of great change, but I
imagine you already knew that.

Lord Plutomon is the Digimon that governs this area and currently
serves as the leader of the warriors of Iliad.

There are many powerful warriors here, but they are all forced to
bow down before Lord Plutomon's superior strength.

It is said that if Lord Plutomon unleashes his special move,
it instantly vaporizes any enemies in the area.

Lately, however, Lord Plutomon does not show himself, and
makes only his orders known to the public.

Ah, but I imagine you must know the rest of the story better
than anyone.

Titamon is as tough as they come, but has constantly sought
to augment his power even further.

His strength has been forged from the bitter grudges held by
the countless Digimon he defeated.

As such, Titamon seeks additional strength to try and clear
his mind of this resentment.

Titamon is not a warrior of Iliad. He appeared from parts
unknown and went on a rampage.

That was when he encountered Lord Plutomon, and agreed to
work for his newfound master.

Just why did he agree to serve beneath Lord Plutomon? The
answer to that query remains a mystery to this day.

Perhaps there was something between them that led them on
this path.

However, it would seem that Titamon is changing, too, of
late, little by little... Hehehe.

Ogremon is a Digimon who fights for Lord Plutomon as a 
warrior of Iliad.
He seems to often team up with Fugamon and Hyogamon.

The other warriors, however, often tease him for his apparent
shortcomings.

By the way, Ogremon is a leader, while Fugamon is a thinker
and Hyogamon is the type to take action.
Or so it would seem, anyway.

Goblimon are Digimon who serve as the vanguard of the
warriors of Iliad.
They are extremely active and often work together in groups.

There are also similar species known as Shamamon and
SnowGoblimon.
They are essentially not all that much different from Goblimon.

If I had to, I suppose I would say that Shamamon are generally
more energetic...

...while SnowGoblimon are well-suited to the cold. Yes, I suppose
that sums them up quite nicely.
Now, then. Is there anything else that you would like to ask me?

I see... In that case, I wish you luck on the remainder of
your journey.
I've hidden some good loot here! I wonder who'll find it first!

I found it! Wow, I never expected to find it here! I'm literally
shocked right now!

Food always tastes better when it's eaten with others, don't
ya think? These are moments that should be treasured.

Hey, you know what?! *hiccup* The taverner is apparently
one of the toughest cookies around!

I've heard tales about its many rampages back in the day... 
I bet there aren't many out there who would stand a chance!

I'd really like to see the taverner in action for myself
one day! *hiccup*
Ah, Lord Plutomon! You are looking rather radiant this fine day!

You, there! You think so, too, yes? Behold the amazing bust
that I have sculpted!

Would you not agree that I have perfectly captured Lord
Plutomon's majestic form?!

You should have the honor of meeting Lord Plutomon so as to
understand his true magnificence for yourself!

Now, then. Where should I set up shop next? I suppose a bit
of research is in order.
Let's battle! Naturally, I'm referring to a card battle, of course!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Stop running, ya coward! I need a few more wins under my belt!
No! My record has been blemished! W-Waaah!
Hooray! That's another victory for me! I'm gonna keep on winning!

Ya don't strike me as a serious card battler. You're more of
a casual player, right?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Huh? You're a serious player? Uh, do ya mind challengin'
somebody else, then?
Looks like I lost this one. That was fun, though. Thanks.

At last, I finally won one. Everybody's always out of my league,
so I was on quite a losin' streak, there.
